pool.name: iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF
pool.thesis: Institutional ETF flows ($762M liquidations cleared shorts) with BTC at $75K vs $126K ATH. Post-halving window remains open through 2026.
pool.catalyst: Trump strategic bitcoin reserve legislation progress May-June 2026
pool.bear_case: Fed hawkish pivot on sticky inflation could drain liquidity from risk assets
pool.invalidation: Break below $65K support invalidates bull cycle thesis

robinhood_tickers.note: Direct BTC exposure without custody risk

evaluations.signal_reason: Strategic bitcoin reserve stalled in Congress for over a year, Fed hawkish pivot undermining risk asset thesis.
evaluations.summary: <cite index="4-1,4-6">IBIT trading at $43.03</cite> as <cite index="11-1,11-5">Bitcoin hit $75,901 today</cite>. <cite index="23-3,23-10">Trump's strategic bitcoin reserve has "languished" without congressional approval for over a year</cite> despite March 2025 executive order. <cite index="31-17,39-18">Fed officials now signaling potential rate hikes with Cleveland Fed estimating 3.5% inflation</cite>, creating major headwinds for risk assets like Bitcoin ETFs.
evaluations.updated_bear_case: <cite index="31-3,31-4">Stagflationary energy shock and sticky inflation forcing Fed into "no landing" scenario where rates stay elevated through late 2027</cite>. <cite index="34-17,37-3">Major institutions now expect zero rate cuts in 2026</cite>, removing the liquidity backstop that supported crypto rallies.

evaluations.signal_reason: Strong BTC momentum above $78K with institutional flows but congressional delay on strategic reserve.
evaluations.summary: <cite index="4-1,4-2">IBIT trading at $44.48 after breaking through consolidation range</cite>. <cite index="18-4,18-7">Bitcoin broke above $78,000 following Trump's Iran ceasefire extension, with broader crypto market lifting</cite>. <cite index="23-3,25-9">Strategic Bitcoin Reserve remains stalled in Congress over a year after executive order, with potential inclusion in year-end defense bill as best chance for passage</cite>.
evaluations.updated_bear_case: <cite index="23-17">Reserve is bullish for BTC only as long as it exists, but existence not guaranteed beyond January 2029 without legislation</cite>. <cite index="16-19,16-20">Fed's cautious rate cuts approach and stronger inflation data keeping financial conditions tighter than Bitcoin prefers</cite>.

evaluations.signal_reason: IBIT down to $44.14 while <cite index='11-1'>Bitcoin at $77,809</cite> suggests ETF trading at discount. <cite index='25-3,25-10'>Strategic reserve has 'languished' for over a year without congressional approval</cite>.
evaluations.summary: <cite index='2-1'>IBIT at $44.14</cite> while <cite index='11-1,11-2'>BTC at $77,809 - down $384 from yesterday</cite>. <cite index='14-4,14-8'>BTC dominance rising to 58.1% with Fear & Greed at 46</cite>. <cite index='21-4,21-5'>Trump's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve still awaits congressional action with potential defense bill inclusion late 2026</cite>.
evaluations.updated_bear_case: <cite index='25-17'>Reserve bullish only as long as it exists, but not guaranteed beyond January 2029 without legislation</cite>. <cite index='14-6,14-7'>$107B daily volume below average suggests institutional flows remain sidelined</cite>.

review.signal_reason: IBIT down to $44.14 while <cite index='11-1'>Bitcoin at $77,809</cite> suggests ETF trading at discount. <cite index='25-3,25-10'>Strategic reserve has 'languished' for over a year without congressional approval</cite>.
review.summary: <cite index='2-1'>IBIT at $44.14</cite> while <cite index='11-1,11-2'>BTC at $77,809 - down $384 from yesterday</cite>. <cite index='14-4,14-8'>BTC dominance rising to 58.1% with Fear & Greed at 46</cite>. <cite index='21-4,21-5'>Trump's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve still awaits congressional action with potential defense bill inclusion late 2026</cite>.
review.updated_bear_case: <cite index='25-17'>Reserve bullish only as long as it exists, but not guaranteed beyond January 2029 without legislation</cite>. <cite index='14-6,14-7'>$107B daily volume below average suggests institutional flows remain sidelined</cite>.
